name: T-14 Armata
description: Russia's next-generation main battle tank featuring an unmanned turret, Afghanit active protection system, and crew capsule design. Limited production constrains operational deployment.

specialAbilities.name: Unmanned Turret
specialAbilities.description: Crew isolated in armored capsule below turret ring, dramatically improving survivability after turret penetration.

specialAbilities.name: Afghanit Active Protection
specialAbilities.description: Radar-guided hard-kill APS detects and intercepts incoming projectiles including APFSDS rounds.
